mapper.select: SELECT vote_type FROM voj_discussion_reply_votes WHERE discussion_reply_id = #{discussionReplyId} AND voter_uid = #{voterUid} AND vote_type IN (1, -1)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voj_discussion_reply_votes v JOIN voj_discussion_replies r ON v.discussion_reply_id = r.discussion_reply_id WHERE r.discussion_thread_id = #{discussionThreadId} AND v.vote_type = 2

SELECT r.discussion_reply_id AS replyId, r.discussion_thread_id AS threadId, t.discussion_thread_name AS threadTitle, r.discussion_reply_content AS content, COUNT(*) AS reportCount, MAX(v.vote_time) AS lastReportTime FROM voj_discussion_reply_votes v JOIN voj_discussion_replies r ON v.discussion_reply_id = r.discussion_reply_id LEFT JOIN voj_discussion_threads t ON r.discussion_thread_id = t.discussion_thread_id WHERE v.vote_type = 2 GROUP BY r.discussion_reply_id, r.discussion_thread_id, t.discussion_thread_name, r.discussion_reply_content ORDER BY reportCount DESC, lastReportTime DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT discussion_reply_id) FROM voj_discussion_reply_votes WHERE vote_type = 2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO voj_discussion_reply_votes(discussion_reply_id, voter_uid, vote_type) VALUES (#{discussionReplyId}, #{voterUid}, #{voteType}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE vote_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM voj_discussion_reply_votes WHERE discussion_reply_id = #{discussionReplyId} AND voter_uid = #{voterUid} AND vote_type = #{voteType}
